provider_id.description: The single provider whose BAA terms are being analyzed (e.g. northstar, alpha, beta, gamma, delta, epsilon).

subpoena_scope.description: The scope of the regulatory subpoena being assessed against this provider's BAA.

subpoena_template_id.description: The RegulatorTemplate identifier that defines the subpoena's discovery requests.

disclosure_position.description: ClearFlow's disclosure position for this provider (maps to the BAADisclosurePosition case variable).

cross_baa_conflicts.description: Other providers whose BAA terms conflict with this provider's recommended action, each with a one-line reason.

rationale.description: Decision-support draft: BAA terms summary, disclosure obligation, and legal-risk note for counsel review.
